reputationScale.label: Hated
reputationScale.description: The party is considered enemies. Most people refuse service, guards may arrest or attack, and information is hidden or deliberately falsified.

reputationScale.label: Reviled
reputationScale.description: The party is openly condemned. Many refuse to interact, rumors spread quickly, and authorities monitor their actions closely.

reputationScale.label: Despised
reputationScale.description: Most people distrust the party. Information is withheld, merchants raise prices significantly, and NPCs assume bad intent.

reputationScale.label: Distrusted
reputationScale.description: NPCs are cautious around the party. Deals are worse than normal, secrets are not shared, and interactions begin with suspicion.

reputationScale.label: Unwelcome
reputationScale.description: People are wary and guarded. Conversations are hesitant, merchants may charge slightly more, and cooperation is limited.

reputationScale.label: Neutral
reputationScale.description: The party is unknown or unremarkable. Interactions are normal and prices are standard.

reputationScale.label: Known
reputationScale.description: The party has a small reputation. Some NPCs recognize them and conversations start more warmly.

reputationScale.label: Respected
reputationScale.description: People trust the party's intentions. Merchants may offer modest discounts and NPCs share information more freely.

reputationScale.label: Admired
reputationScale.description: The party has proven themselves. NPCs cooperate readily and valuable rumors or opportunities become available.

reputationScale.label: Revered
reputationScale.description: The party is widely admired. Many offer assistance, share secrets, or provide support without payment.

reputationScale.label: Legendary
reputationScale.description: The party's deeds are widely known. Leaders grant audiences, powerful allies emerge, and aid may be offered freely.
